s: A minimalistic talk timer to help structure your talks and presentations.
d:
Min Time is a countdown app with count-up mode. Its main goal is to help you structure your talks and presentations. It divides the talk time into three phases: green, yellow and red. At a glance you can see how much time is left.

For example, a 70-minute talk could be divided into 50, 15 and 5 minute segments. Once started, Min Time counts down from 70 to 0, or counts up from 0, changing colors and vibrating when a new phase is reached. During a presentation you can switch to other apps; a live notification keeps you updated with remaining time and phase progress. The app is intentionally kept simple. Just a few taps and you are ready to give your talk. Finish your presentations and tasks just in time.
